parameters.query: SELECT viewer_name, viewer_title, viewer_company, category, priority, action_recommended, view_count, last_viewed_at FROM recruiter_views WHERE last_viewed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY priority DESC, last_viewed_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT sender_name, sender_title, sender_company, category, message_preview, requires_response, response_sent FROM linkedin_messages WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY category, received_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT requester_name, requester_title, requester_company, category, action_recommended, action_taken FROM linkedin_connection_requests WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY category, received_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT search_count, search_terms, searcher_companies, searcher_titles, reported_at FROM search_appearances WHERE reported_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY reported_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT topic_title, content_pillar, published_at, engagement_score, status FROM content_calendar WHERE (status = 'published' AND published_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') OR (status = 'drafted' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') ORDER BY published_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

SELECT metric_type, metric_value, metric_date FROM linkedin_metrics WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND metric_date > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY metric_date DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT cv_identifier, cv_target_role, overall_status, critical_count, warning_count, checked_at FROM profile_cv_alignment WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND resolved = false ORDER BY checked_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT id AS tenant_id, name AS tenant_name, notification_email, candidate_profile, search_config, email_config FROM tenants WHERE is_active = true

SELECT viewer_name, viewer_title, viewer_company, category, priority, action_recommended, view_count, last_viewed_at FROM recruiter_views WHERE last_viewed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY priority DESC, last_viewed_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT sender_name, sender_title, sender_company, category, message_preview, requires_response, response_sent FROM linkedin_messages WHERE received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY category, received_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT requester_name, requester_title, requester_company, category, action_recommended, action_taken FROM linkedin_connection_requests WHERE received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY category, received_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT search_count, search_terms, searcher_companies, searcher_titles, reported_at FROM search_appearances WHERE reported_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY reported_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT topic_title, content_pillar, published_at, engagement_score, status FROM content_calendar WHERE (status = 'published' AND published_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') OR (status = 'drafted' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') ORDER BY published_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10
SELECT metric_type, metric_value, metric_date FROM linkedin_metrics WHERE metric_date > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY metric_date DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT cv_identifier, cv_target_role, overall_status, critical_count, warning_count, checked_at FROM profile_cv_alignment WHERE resolved = false ORDER BY checked_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT id AS tenant_id, name AS tenant_name, notification_email, candidate_profile, search_config, email_config FROM tenants WHERE is_active = true
